_note: Sample products to create manually during the demo. Each object maps exactly to the Create Product form fields.

demoProducts.Description: A stunning 27-inch 4K UHD monitor with IPS panel technology delivering true-to-life colors and wide viewing angles. Features USB-C connectivity, HDR400 support, and an ultra-thin bezel design perfect for professional workstations.
Full HD 1080p webcam with autofocus, built-in dual noise-cancelling microphones and a 90-degree field of view. Ideal for video conferencing, live streaming, and remote work setups.

Height-adjustable electric standing desk with dual motor system and memory presets for four height positions. The spacious 140 x 70 cm tabletop is made from solid bamboo with a smooth matte finish, supporting up to 80 kg.

Ergonomic mesh office chair with adjustable lumbar support, 3D armrests, and synchronized tilt mechanism. Breathable mesh backrest keeps you comfortable during long work sessions. Certified for 8-hour daily use.
Premium full-zip hoodie made from 80% organic cotton and 20% recycled polyester fleece. Features a kangaroo front pocket, adjustable drawstring hood, and ribbed cuffs. Available in sizes S to XXL.
demoProducts.Dimensions: Available S / M / L / XL / XXL

demoProducts.Description: Lightweight water-resistant running jacket with reflective strips for low-light visibility. Packable design with a built-in stuff pocket, two zippered side pockets, and laser-cut ventilation panels for breathability.

Premium 100% single-origin Arabica whole bean coffee, specially roasted for cold brew preparation. Notes of dark chocolate, caramel, and a smooth low-acidity finish. Each 500g bag yields approximately 8 litres of cold brew concentrate.

First-harvest ceremonial grade matcha sourced from Uji, Japan. Stone-ground to a superfine powder with a vibrant green colour and rich umami flavour. 30g tin provides approximately 30 servings. Rich in antioxidants and L-theanine.

Executive fountain pen set with stainless steel medium nib, anodised aluminium barrel, and converter filling system. Includes 6 ink cartridges in assorted colors and a premium magnetic gift box. Perfect for signatures and formal correspondence.

Qi-certified 15W fast wireless charging pad with non-slip silicone base and LED indicator. Compatible with all Qi-enabled devices including iPhone and Android. Ultra-thin 8mm profile integrates seamlessly into any desk setup.
